---
title: "Margaret Humbert"
---

## Margaret Humbert

**Dates:** (b. 1858/9)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. Lewis Humbert

### Biography

The daughter of the Rev. Lewis Humbert, Master of St. Cross Hospital, she  later married  the Rev. Alfred R. Wiseman.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 11th [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
